Bash(node -e 'const {PrismaClient} = require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\); const p = new PrismaClient\(\); p.user.findMany\(\).then\(u => { console.log\(JSON.stringify\(u.map\(x=>\({email:x.email,role:x.role}\)\)\)\); return p.$disconnect\(\); }\);')

Bash(node -e 'require\('\\''dotenv'\\''\).config\({path:'\\''.env.local'\\''}\); const {PrismaClient} = require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\); const p = new PrismaClient\(\); p.user.findMany\({select:{email:true,role:true}}\).then\(u => { console.log\(JSON.stringify\(u\)\); return p.$disconnect\(\); }\);')
